column3: gPTP offset spikes to 8 µs after switch reset
column14:
h2. Observed
After a commanded reset of the 88Q5050, offset to GM spikes to 8 µs for ~2 s.

h2. Expected
Offset stays ≤ 1 µs (3σ) per SYS-GPTP-001.

h2. Notes
* Reproducible on bench B2
* {{tsyncd}} logs show BMCA re-run
{code}
[ts] offset=8123ns state=UNCERTAIN
{code}

column3: HTP orchestrator misses deadline signal under thermal throttling
column14:
h2. Observed
At Tj > 95 °C the deadline violation signal arrives 40 ms late.

h2. Impact
Violates SYS-HTP-001 (≤ 5 ms).

column3: Export SYS.3 gPTP tracker for offline review
column14: Weekly Codebeamer CSV export of the gPTP requirements tracker for the offline agent workflow.

column3: SafeRTOS heartbeat DTC not latched after PMIC brown-out
column14:
h2. Observed
Brown-out on Intel PMIC rail VDD_SAIL causes heartbeat gap but DTC_SAIL_HB_LOSS is not latched.

h2. Suspected
Latch window (100 ms) shorter than PMIC recovery ramp (140 ms).

column3: Define degradation ladder for camera time-base uncertainty
column14:
As a fusion consumer I need a defined degradation ladder (kSynchronized -> kUncertain -> kUnavailable) so that ADAS features shed load predictably.

h3. Acceptance criteria
# Ladder documented as operating concept
# States mapped to ara::tsync status API
# Reviewed by safety
